User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.Time of request: 06:58AM UTC. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions. "[9] PER DUPE RP IS TOW TK DRVR , PUSHED BLK MERZ TO RHS , XRAY DRVR STANDING IN SLOW LN , RP SEEN ALCOHOL IN VWH"
"[9] CORR LINE 3 BY STANDERS PICKED UP THE INV PTYS NEAR THE SWITCH BACKS-- UNK WHERE TC OCCD "
"[7] VEH FLEW OFF THE ROAD AND INVS HIKED UP TO THE ROAD FOR HELP - NO CALLS INTO 911 // NEG CALL HISTORY"
"[6] ADV 1 MORE VEH POSS INV - WAS UNABLE TO LOCATE "
"[3] ADV TC OCCD SOMWHERE ON MT BALDY NEAR SWITCHBACKS"
"[1] SBSO LL ADV SAN ANTONIO ON LL ADV A TC OCCD A FEW HRS AGO VEH FLEW OFF THR SIDE OF THE ROAD "
"[9] ADV RP TO GET BACK INTO HIS VEH AND PUT WINDOWS UP TO NOT ARGUE W/ INLVD"
"[12] EDWINS ADV UNABLE TO MAKE ETA"
"[6] BOTH ON RHS , "VEHS ARE STUCK TOGETHER" "
"[5] 2 VEH TC - GRY OR GRN MINI SUV VS WHI SUBA COUPE "
"[4] [Appended, 00:05:49] [1] INFO PER SBSO - UNK COORDINATES // IPHONE TC ALERT"
"[1] C75-R2 CLOSRURE INFO -- FULL FREEWAY CLOSURE 210 ABOVE STERLING ON EB AND WB SIDE -- EB TRFC DIF OFF AT DEL ROSA ON WB SIDE TRFC DIV OFF AT HIHGLAND APPROX 12 HRS "

Log.Location: "Sr60 W Eo / World Logistics Center Wlc"
